smoke.detail: Box smoke on FTO-43 fixture: two booleans HIA_boiled_egg=true, BBB_boiled_egg=false (TPSA=37.3, WLOGP=0.091; point below the yolk's WLOGP floor). pytest tests/test_model_boiled_egg.py: 4 passed (FTO-43 smoke + axis-convention pins: in-yolk diazepam BBB=true, in-white-not-yolk metronidazole HIA=true/BBB=false, outside-both sucrose both false), output validated against core.schemas.OutputRecord. rdkit 2026.03.3.

note: BOILED-Egg (Daina & Zoete 2016) point-in-polygon in (x=TPSA, y=WLOGP): one impl serves distribution (BBB) + permeability (HIA), both booleans (True=permeant/absorbed). WLOGP=Crippen MolLogP (t10 lens); TPSA=CalcTPSA(includeSandP=True) to match the original model. Region vertices = pyBOILEDegg gia_coords/bbb_coords, fetched+validated on box (101 pts each, bounds match published), in regions.json; ray-casting membership so env is rdkit-only. Lock box-solved (linux-64, rdkit 2026.03.3). Coarse passive screen, reconciled ordinally at t42 (F-4), not a gate.
